meaning: n.菲律宾共和国,菲律宾群岛
examples: The people of the Philippines have voted to elect a new president.
A cloud of volcanic ash is spreading across wide areas of the Philippines.
Ms. Halliwell visited the Philippines in her capacity as a Special Representative of UNICEF.
Net 1, he says, is working on smart card systems for Vietnam, Indonesia, the Philippines and Colombia.
Corporate governance rating systems covering all listed companies have been proposed in Hong Kong and the Philippines.
